special_mechanics.name: Power Gauge System
special_mechanics.description: Astyanax has an automatic-filling strength gauge that fills when not attacking. When filled, the axe becomes fire-enhanced for stronger attacks. Player can choose between faster weak swings or slower strong ones.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player can wield multiple weapons: Axe (default/Bash), Spear (weaker attack, lower magic consumption), and Sword (highest damage, highest magic consumption). Weapons revert to previous form after losing a life.

special_mechanics.name: Magic Spells
special_mechanics.description: Three spells available: Binding Spell (freezes all enemies temporarily, lowest magic cost), Fire Blast (damages enemies in range), Thunderbolt (damages all on-screen enemies, highest magic cost). Magic gauge recharges over time.

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Wikipedia source provides only high-level gameplay mechanics without quantitative physics parameters. No exact movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision data documented for NES version.
